description:
The TorusMesh component generates procedural geometry that is used with MeshRenderer.

This mesh resembles a Donut.

fields.MinorSegments: The amount of detail/cuts along the circle of the torus. Making this 4 will make the torus a square instead of a circle shape.
fields.MajorSegments: The amount of detail/cuts going around and through the center along the outside and inside.
fields.MinorRadius: the fatness/thickness of the torus. If this is too big than the hole in the center will seal up.
fields.UVScale: the scale of the material detail on the surface of the torus.

usage: Attach to a slot and insert this component into a MeshRenderer to view its geometry. Don't forget to add a Material
